pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Upgrade jacoco-maven-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may fail to instrument or run on Java 21 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-checkstyle-plugin to a snapshot version.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version that supports the 'release' flag and Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins might not fully support Java 21 features or the release flag correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-war-plugin to a snapshot version.
Set scope to 'provided' for jakarta.annotation-api as it is provided by the Jakarta EE runtime in Java 21 environments.
pom.xml.why_exists: Avoids packaging conflicts with the runtime-provided API in modern Jakarta EE containers.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated 'source' and 'target' compiler arguments with the unified 'release' argument.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated in favor of 'release' in modern Maven compiler plugin versions to ensure consistent boot classpath usage.

src/main/java/net/petcu/store/domain/Use.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/net/petcu/store/domain/Use.why_exists: Compilation failure due to 'serial' access restriction (JEP 416) when the serialVersionUID field is not annotated with @Serial in Java 14+.
Compilation error: cannot find symbol 'Serial' if the annotation is used without importing it.

src/main/java/net/petcu/store/service/In.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/net/petcu/store/service/In.why_exists: Java 21 enforces that serialVersionUID fields in serializable classes must be annotated with @Serial, otherwise a compile error occurs.

src/main/java/net/petcu/store/service/In.general_idea: Import java.io.Serial to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/net/petcu/store/service/In.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is not available without importing java.io.Serial, causing a compile error.

src/test/java/net/petcu/store/repository.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/test/java/net/petcu/store/repository.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial on serialVersionUID, the code may fail to compile or trigger warnings/errors depending on the compiler settings (e.g., javac -Xlint:serial).
